channel.title: Thomas Cook's Blog on Thomas Cook Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Thomas Cook's Blog on Thomas Cook Blog

item.title: Hugo Markdown Bible
item.description:
Headers

H1

H2

H3

H4

H5
H6

Emphasis

Bold
Italic
Strikethrough

Lists

  1. First item
  2. Second item
  3. Third item
    1. First sub item
    2. Second sub item
  • First item
  • Second item
  • Third item
    • First sub item
    • Second sub item

Links

I’m an inline-style link (Google)

I’m a relative reference to a repository file (home page)

URLs and URLs in angle brackets will automatically get turned into links. http://www.example.com or http://www.example.com and sometimes example.com (but not on Github, for example).

item.title: My Neovim Setup
item.description:
What the heck even is Neovim?

I found about about Vim and Neovim through the Primeagen Youtube channel. Vim itself is an old text editor, and it works on the concept of buffers and various shortcuts called “motions”.

I was intrigued as I saw Primeagen doing some really cool stuff with it, using sequences of motions to do complicated edits on files which would normally require the use of a mouse and/or some scripting.

item.title: Bathroom Renovations
item.description:
The bathroom was the second room I tackled, after my wife’s office/safe haven room.

Unfortunately, I don’t have any pictures of what it looked like before, but basically it was an empty room which used to be a childrens nursery.

It is at the back of the house with a window looking out across to a quiet hill on the other side of the beck, and the old owners for some reason had the bright idea to put the bathroom in the middle of the house, with no window or ventilation, so it was getting mouldy. Genius!

item.title: Bedroom Renovations
item.description:
The bedroom was the fourth room I tackled, after the kids nursery/office space.

Here is hat it looked like before:

Bedroom Before 1

Bedroom Before 2

What I did in this room is ripped all the skirting off as it as shit and glued on with shit glue and replace with nice new pine skirting which is screwed into the brickwork (belt and braces boys!), I then fixed a load of broken floorboards (this place was built in 1880, so it’s old and rickety). I then laid down a 6mm ply floor skin across the entire floor to create a more even feel underfoot and to help spread loads a bit (maybe wishful thinking hah).

item.title: Jace Windu
item.description:
About

Home Planet

Jewell

Age

42

Species

Human

Stats

Stat Value DM
STR 5 -1
DEX 13 +2
END 5 -1
INT 6 +0
EDU 9 +1
SOC 5 -1

Skills

Flyer 0, Streetwise 0, Drive 0, Navigation 2, Profession (Polymers) 1, Carouse 1, Art 0, Deception 1, Persuade 1, Steward 0, Electronics (Comms) 1, Vacc Suit 0, Recon 0, Tactics (Military) 1, Gunner (Turret) 1, Gun Combat 0, Medic 1
